# Personal Data Protection Act 2010

Jurisdiction: Malaysia
Region: MY
Citation: Personal Data Protection Act 2010
Authority: Department of Personal Data Protection Malaysia
Source URL: https://www.pdp.gov.my/ppdpv1/en/akta-709/
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, cross_border_transfer, security_breach
Keywords: Malaysia PDPA, Act 709, personal data protection principles

## Summary
Malaysia private-sector personal data law with seven data protection principles, rights, transfer restrictions, and sectoral codes.

## Key compliance obligations
- Comply with general, notice and choice, disclosure, security, retention, data integrity, and access principles.
- Provide notices and access/correction rights.
- Assess cross-border transfers and processing by data users.
